---
format:
    html:
        css: ../style.css
        include-in-header: home_button.html
filters:
  - pyodide
execute:
  echo: true
  code-tools: true
  freeze: auto
---

## Jupyter Notebook

<a class="colab-button" href="https://colab.research.google.com/github/ampivirotto/virtual_workshops/blob/main/practical_stats/Practical_Statistics.ipynb" target="_blank"> Launch Full Notebook in Colab </a>




## Slide deck

<iframe
  src="slideshow.html"
  width="100%"
  height="1000px"
  style="border: 1px solid #eee;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
